intro: Desmocladus eyreanus, also known as Eyre's fork-fern or fork fern, is a rare and endemic plant species found in the Eyre Peninsula of South Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems.
